top_signals.title: Trump Says No Rush for Iran Deal, US Blockade Stays
top_signals.summary: U.S. President Donald Trump said on Sunday he had told his representatives not to rush into any deal with Iran, as his administration played down hopes of an imminent breakthrough in the three-month-old war that had been raised a day earlier.The U.S.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Americas Gold stock swap ends Sprott silver stream burden
top_signals.summary: It will issue 7.96 million common shares to Sprott Mining at a price of $5.57 apiece to cancel the remaining obligation to ship 592,000 oz. silver.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.

top_signals.title: Chinese Ship Leaves Standoff Near Taiwan-Controlled Islands
top_signals.summary: A Chinese coast guard ship left waters near Taiwan's strategically located Pratas Islands at the top of the South China Sea on Sunday following a tense standoff and verbal sparring between the coast guards, Taiwan's Coast Guard said.China claims democratically governed Taiwan as its own territory…
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: McEwen says San José mine cash generation blew past expectations
top_signals.summary: Total dividends from San José has now reached $58.2 million, surpassing its original target of $40-50 million for 2026.

top_signals.title: Perpetua Resources gets $2.9B EXIM loan for Stibnite project in Idaho
top_signals.summary: Last year, the company began early works construction at the project, which was fast-tracked by the Trump administration.
